caption: The video shows a close-up of a person working on a mechanical engine, likely part of a vehicle or machinery. The individual is using their hands to manipulate and adjust components within the engine block. The focus is on the upper section of the engine, where the person appears to be either installing or removing a part, possibly a cylinder head or a similar component. The surrounding area includes various tools and parts, indicating a workshop or garage setting. The person's hands are steady and precise, suggesting they have experience with mechanical work. The engine itself has a metallic finish with visible bolts and other mechanical elements, emphasizing the technical nature of the task being performed.
